title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Nami. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Nami shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm the one who decides that!!

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
